title: Claude Fable 5 Just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates Claude Fable 5's website design capabilities through progressive challenges, comparing it against Claude Opus 4.8. The video argues that Fable 5 represents a significant shift in AI-driven web design through superior prompt handling, token efficiency, and design extraction methods.
writeup: Jack Roberts tests Claude Fable 5 on website design through a series of progressive challenges, benchmarking its output against Claude Opus 4.8. The comparison centers on three claimed advantages: stronger prompt handling, better token efficiency, and improved methods for extracting design from prompts. The argument is that Fable 5 marks a meaningful step in AI-driven web design rather than an incremental update.
